summary: Fixed apply_install_plan duplicate-target bug and added 1.0 preview-only release readiness checklist with weak-coverage tests.

files_changed.summary: Added seen-set duplicate detection and list type guard in apply_install_plan
Added 4 tests for duplicate targets, alias duplicates, non-list rejection, and empty list success
Added 2 CLI tests for test-command inclusion and real-write rejection sanity gate
New release readiness checklist for preview-only 1.0

acceptance.item: Duplicate target detection uses resolved paths
Duplicate targets raise before any write
acceptance.evidence: test_duplicate_target_aborts_all asserts no file exists after ValueError
docs/RELEASE_1_0_CHECKLIST.md created with 10 functional, 5 safety, 3 non-functional gates
test_install_without_dry_run_rejected and new sanity gate still pass

acceptance.item: All write-helper tests use temp dirs
acceptance.evidence: Every new TestApplyInstallPlan test uses TemporaryDirectory

risks.description: Checklist claims real writes are intentionally deferred; Codex should confirm this matches product intent.

deviations: Added 2 extra CLI tests beyond minimal fix because test-command inclusion and real-write rejection were weakly covered.
